markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync on content, CTAs, 2026 goals, and reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Runway Needed:** Relay must approve \~40 staged topics to build a content runway, as only 6 posts are currently in review.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [**CTA Implementation Blocked:** New CTAs are blocked pending a dev ticket for a compliance-text field in Contentful. Relay will start with 4 CTAs once unblocked.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [**2026 Goal Brainstorm:** A brainstorm call is set to define the 2026 strategy, exploring options like mini-sites vs. a blog transformation to align dev resources.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [**Reporting Cadence Set:** Monthly deep-dive reports will be delivered asynchronously at the start of the last week of the month to meet Relay's internal presentation deadlines.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline & Topic Approval

  - [**Status:** 6 posts in review (Nacho), 16 posts staged (partner).](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [**Action:** Relay must approve topics from the \~40 staged options to build a content runway.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
      - [Use the new Airtable interface for approvals.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
      - [Reject topics definitively out of scope; comment on others for future backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
      - [Ping Bailey on Slack after approving a batch.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [**Headline Changes:** Initial SEO-focused headlines are placeholders. Final headlines are refined post-drafting based on deeper research (Exa, Tavoli, Perplexity) to ensure accuracy and fit the SERP.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)

### Topic Cluster Strategy

  - [**Issue:** Content is unevenly distributed across the 6 topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=359.0)
      - [**High Volume:** "Cash flow management," "multiple account banking."](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
      - [**Low Volume:** "Business banking alternatives and comparisons."](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [**Action:** Bailey will analyze distribution to balance content across clusters, which is critical for accurate Looker performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [**AI for Comparison Articles:** The AI is effective for comparison articles, though the tone requires finessing to remain neutral. This is a key opportunity to test Relay's internal compliance process.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)

### CTA Implementation

  - [**Goal:** Implement new CTAs to improve conversion and streamline compliance.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [**Blocker:** Contentful lacks a field for the required compliance text below the CTA button.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [**Action:** Nacho will submit a dev ticket to add this field.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [**Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [Start with a library of 4 CTAs covering common use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [GrowthX will use an HTML tag system to auto-insert approved CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)

### 2026 Goal Brainstorm

  - [**Purpose:** Define the 2026 content strategy and align dev resources.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [**Options:**](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
      - [**Mini-sites:** Small, subfolder sites on the main sitemap.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
      - [**Blog Transformation:** A major overhaul of the existing blog.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [**Action:** A brainstorm call will be scheduled to discuss these options and determine the best approach.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)

### Reporting & Performance

  - [**Monthly Report Cadence:** Asynchronous delivery at the start of the last week of the month.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Provides Relay with baseline numbers for internal presentations.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [**Looker Dashboard:** Currently being updated to align cohorts with topic clusters for better performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [**Performance Signals:**](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
      - [**Traffic:** Significant increase, driven by the podcast and a paid ad campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
      - [**LLM Presence:** Relay rose from 3rd to 2nd in competitive presence.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
      - [**Citations:** Volatile; a recent drop in brand citations may signal a shift in LLM prioritization toward third-party content.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)

### NDA & Documentation

  - [**Action:** Nacho will send the NDA to Bailey today.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [**Purpose:** To unlock access to confidential documentation for the "accountant" and "bookkeeper" personas.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
  - [**Benefit:** This documentation will inform the next round of keyword research and provide valuable context for the content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Nacho:**](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
      - [Approve a batch of topics from the \~40 staged options.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
      - [Submit dev ticket for the Contentful CTA compliance-text field.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
      - [Send the NDA to Bailey.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=359.0)
      - [Analyze topic cluster distribution to balance content.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=359.0)
      - [Schedule the 2026 goal brainstorm call.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
      - [Inform Jacob of the new asynchronous reporting cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
      - [Schedule the 2026 goal brainstorm call.](https://fathom.video/share/yQbtAGBxshWUhPWnMKKso6vtizzeYoDS?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
